title: Outdoor Garden Tree Spike Light
description: The TREE 2999 SPIKE Outdoor Garden Tree Spike Light is a 12W durable and stylish lighting solution designed for garden, landscape, and tree illumination. With its sand grey finish and IP65 rating, it combines weather resistance with modern aesthetics, delivering reliable performance in all outdoor conditions.

details.Product Details: The TREE 2999 SPIKE is a premium outdoor garden spike light tailored for highlighting trees, shrubs, and landscaped features. Its compact yet powerful 12W output ensures sufficient brightness to enhance the beauty of outdoor spaces.
details.Premium Construction: Built from high-grade materials with a sand grey body, the fixture resists corrosion and environmental wear. Its robust IP65 rating ensures resistance against dust and water, making it suitable for long-lasting performance in harsh outdoor environments.
details.Lighting Performance: Powered by AC 150-250V input, the 12W LED produces a warm 3000K glow. Its directional beam ensures targeted illumination, perfect for enhancing the visual appeal of garden landscapes.
details.Easy Installation: With dimensions of L242 × W71MM, the spike base allows easy placement in soil, grass, or landscaped beds without complicated installation procedures.
details.Versatile Application: Ideal for illuminating trees, garden pathways, outdoor landscapes, villas, and resorts. The TREE 2999 SPIKE combines beauty with practicality to transform outdoor environments.

title: Curve Shape Magnetic Track Light
description: The New Generation Curved Shape Magnetic Light is a futuristic indoor lighting solution that combines artistic curves with advanced magnetic technology. Its elegant flowing design and smooth illumination bring a modern, luxurious touch to interiors. Designed for flexibility, it allows dynamic layouts and creative lighting patterns in homes, offices, galleries, and showrooms.

details.Product Details: The Curved Shape Magnetic Light introduces a new dimension in lighting design with its arc-shaped profile. Its trimless, minimal aesthetic blends seamlessly into interiors, while the magnetic system allows effortless repositioning and flexible layouts without tools.
details.Premium Construction: Crafted from high-quality aluminum with a durable powder-coated finish for excellent heat dissipation and strength. Integrated with advanced LED technology, it ensures bright, energy-efficient, and long-lasting illumination, while the curved form adds a futuristic design element.
details.Easy Installation: The magnetic track mechanism makes installation simple and tool-free. Just place the fixture onto the magnetic rail, and it locks firmly in place. Adjustments and repositioning can be done anytime with ease, giving complete freedom in lighting design.
details.Versatile Application: Perfect for luxury homes, retail outlets, hotels, art galleries, offices, and creative studios. The curved design allows architects and designers to create flowing arcs, unique light patterns, and immersive ambiences that enhance both functionality and style.

title: Exclusively Jewellery/ Watches Display Counter Light - Tall Model
description: The SL-JW-002 Jewellery/ Watches Display Counter Light is a 1W elegant tall spotlight designed to bring out the brilliance of high-value jewelry and watches. With advanced USA CREE LED technology and precision optics, this display light creates a captivating shopping experience by enhancing sparkle, shine, and clarity in luxury products. The sleek silver/black design integrates perfectly into modern retail spaces.

details.Product Details: This tall spotlight is engineered for display counters requiring focused yet flexible lighting. It highlights intricate jewelry and watch details, enhancing customer engagement.
details.Premium Construction: Made from robust aluminum with silver and black body options, it is both stylish and durable, offering reliable performance in commercial environments.
details.Lighting Performance: The 1W USA CREE LED ensures consistent high-quality lighting with CCT options of 4000K and 6000K. The 25° beam angle provides perfect accent lighting for luxury showcases.
details.Easy Installation: Its taller 200H mm profile makes it ideal for deeper counters and larger showcases, offering versatile positioning with minimal effort.
details.Applications: Perfect for luxury watch counters, diamond showrooms, exhibition stands, and retail boutiques that demand elegant and precise illumination.

title: Outdoor 4 Logo Projector Movable Projector Light
description: The Outdoor 4 Logo Movable Projector Light is a powerful and versatile lighting solution designed for large-scale outdoor branding and promotions. With its 80W high-efficiency design and advanced 4-lens system, this projector ensures superior clarity and brightness, making it ideal for projecting multiple logos on building facades, event spaces, and commercial environments. Built with IP65-rated weatherproof housing, it is engineered to withstand rain, dust, and harsh outdoor conditions while maintaining stable performance.

details.Product Details: This projector is purpose-built for outdoor environments, offering professional-grade projection of up to four logos simultaneously. It is perfect for advertising, decorative lighting, and brand visibility in high-traffic outdoor locations.
details.Premium Construction: Constructed from high-quality materials with a sleek black finish, the projector provides durability and a modern appearance. Its IP65 protection ensures resistance against dust and water, making it reliable for long-term outdoor installations.
details.Lighting Performance: With an 80W output and a 5000K daylight color temperature, it delivers sharp and vivid projections. The 4-lens optical system enhances image quality, ensuring logos remain crisp and highly visible even at larger distances.
details.Easy Installation: Supports AC 110-240V wide voltage input, making it compatible with various electrical setups. Its design allows flexible mounting options, including walls, poles, and ceilings, making installation quick and hassle-free.
details.Energy Efficiency: Despite its powerful brightness, the projector is designed for energy savings, offering high performance with low power consumption, making it both cost-effective and eco-friendly.
details.Applications: Widely used for hotels, shopping malls, corporate offices, exhibitions, outdoor events, stadiums, and building facades. It is the go-to solution for businesses and event organizers looking to create impactful branding with illuminated logo projections.

title: Mini Series Niche Spot Light - 1W
description: The SL-2054 Mini Series Niche Spot Light is a compact yet powerful 1W recessed luminaire, crafted with advanced USA CREE LED technology. Designed for precision illumination, it seamlessly integrates into niches, display cabinets, shelves, and wall details to create a refined lighting experience.

details.Product Details: The SL-2054 is engineered for applications where subtle, refined, and focused light is required. Its miniature size makes it an excellent solution for architectural highlights, creating mood lighting, or bringing attention to décor details without overpowering the space.
details.Premium Construction: Crafted with precision using high-quality die-cast aluminum, this luminaire is both sturdy and lightweight. The matte White and Black finish options provide timeless elegance, while its compact structure ensures durability and long-term performance even with continuous use.
details.Lighting Performance: Powered by advanced USA CREE LED technology, the light delivers warm 3000K illumination with excellent color rendering. Despite being just 1W, it provides sharp, glare-free output, ideal for spotlighting artwork, textured walls, and display corners with accuracy.
details.Easy Installation: Designed with installers in mind, this spotlight features a 15 mm cut-out requirement that makes it extremely simple to mount in tight spaces such as shelves, cabinets, wall alcoves, or false ceilings without compromising on design aesthetics.
details.Applications: Perfect for residential and commercial interiors where compact yet high-quality lighting is required. Widely used in luxury homes, hospitality suites, museums, showrooms, and retail stores to highlight niche spaces, create depth in interiors, or add elegance to decorative features.
